nasb.text: When he was in distress, he entreated the Lord his God and humbled himself greatly before the God of his fathers.

esv.text: And when he was in distress, he entreated the favor of the Lord his God and humbled himself greatly before the God of his fathers.

cnv.text: 瑪拿西在急難的時候，就懇求耶和華他的　神，並且在他列祖的　神面前非常謙卑。

ccb.text: 在困苦中，玛拿西祈求他的上帝耶和华的帮助，并且在他祖先的上帝面前极其谦卑。
